title: Lords of the Realm II

notes:
Introduction screen displays no content buttons or images  they show up as plain text.  This is a very minor issue.  Ingame the game is mostly functional except as follows.  using the mouse to scroll on the map works for up and left but not for down or right. 

Sound is buzzy but is fixed by changing the sampling rate in pulse audio for linux.  I've tested this in manjaro and ubuntu.

The game gives an error message about not using a 256 color display. The game also does this on native Windows 10 so it's more of an issue with the way the game is programmed the game does not run in windowed mode because this error prevents it.  I don't know how to force the game to run 256 color mode.
title: Lords of the Realm II

notes: Scrolling to the right and down does not work. This makes the game nearly unplayable. Pressing Escape key doesn't hard exit anymore. It gives the options to Exit, Yes or No.
title: Lords of the Realm II

notes: Cannot move mouse right or down in campaign map or battle mode.
title: Lords of the Realm II

notes: Runs great except the extremely annoying scrolling issue described already... I believe the game is stuck in 4:3 mode and on wide screen it doesn't realize right and bottom dimensions meaning when you reach the edge on the screen it doesn't scroll. I was able to finish both missions with clicking further and scroll left/up but it is extremely annoying at certain stages...
title: Lords of the Realm II

notes: Cannot scroll on the map right or down. This makes the game unplayable.
